description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric layout. The exterior features a combination of white and wood-textured wall panels, large glass windows, and several green spaces integrated into the design. The house is surrounded by a manicured lawn, mature trees, and shrubbery, with a paved driveway leading to the main entrance. The backyard includes a patio area and what appears to be a small pool or water feature. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with large panes providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is accentuated by a wooden door, a short walkway, and minimalistic landscaping.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white and wood exterior, large windows, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, and a clear view of the landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage area, and additional green spaces along the side of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio, and a small pool or water feature, with more trees and privacy fencing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary entrance, more windows, and the integration of greenery along the perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide wooden door, short walkway, minimal steps, and simple landscaping without a porch or overhang.
